title: Third Life
description: A datapack that mimics the features of Grian's 3rd Life series
body:
Important commands:

Start game (spread players, lives to 3, etc.):

```
/function qwesome:life/start
```

Enable and disable rendering of current hearts for all players:

```
/function qwesome:life/global_display_enable
```

```
/function qwesome:life/global_display_disable
```

Enable and disable rendering of current hearts for yourself (non-op):

```
/trigger player_enable
```

```
/trigger player_disable
```

Set lives:
```
/team join (0-3) (player)
```
